whitespace: Identify the smallest rule that controls the affected spacing or line break.
Preserve surrounding token order and formatting invariants.
Run the public suite after the focused change.
avoid: Broad cleanup unrelated to the observed formatting behavior.
avoid: Adding special cases tied to one visible input.
iterator: Check whether the iterable may be single pass before inspecting it more than once.
Materialize only when repeated traversal is required and safe.
Preserve item order and empty iterable behavior.
avoid: Consuming an iterator during a preliminary check.
avoid: Assuming every iterable supports indexing or length.
parser_normalization: Normalize equivalent parser outputs before branching on their shape.
Keep normalization idempotent and limited to representation, not meaning.
Test both already normalized and unnormalized public cases.
avoid: Scattering duplicate normalization across branches.
avoid: Changing semantic content while canonicalizing structure.
other_logic: Trace inputs, state changes, and outputs through the smallest relevant control path.
Change the narrowest condition or transformation that restores the intended invariant.
Recheck nearby branches for preserved behavior.
avoid: Refactoring unrelated logic during the repair.
avoid: Masking the symptom with a broad fallback.
boundary: Identify the exact boundary and compare behavior immediately before and after it.
Use explicit handling only when the boundary has distinct semantics.
Exercise empty and one element public cases when available.
avoid: Using an off by one adjustment without tracing indexes.
avoid: Assuming nonempty input or an interior position.
condition_inversion: State each branch invariant in plain language before editing the condition.
Check operator precedence and negation scope.
Verify both true and false paths with the public suite.
avoid: Adding nested negations that obscure intent.
avoid: Flipping a condition without checking the else path.
